capture_method: Manual browser run in Google Colab using the uploaded notebook; JSON payloads were copied from the notebook output generated by colab_accelerator_evidence.json.

notes: First run hit a NumPy ABI mismatch after the install cell modified packages inside the active kernel.
Colab Restart session and run all produced the recorded successful evidence payload.
First run hit the same NumPy ABI mismatch after the install cell modified packages inside the active kernel.
Colab Restart session and run all produced the recorded successful evidence payload.
